introSection: Viktor Vandorm (Danish for Viktor Water Worm) is a steel roller coaster located at BonBon-Land in Holme-Olstrup, Sjælland, Denmark.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride previously operated as Flinker Fridolin at Panorama Park in Germany from 1993 to 2007.

fullText:
Viktor Vandorm (Danish for Viktor Water Worm) is a steel roller coaster located at BonBon-Land in Holme-Olstrup, Sjælland, Denmark.

The ride previously operated as Flinker Fridolin at Panorama Park in Germany from 1993 to 2007.



Green track and supports.
